title: MegaBingo
description: A customizable easy-to-use bingo plugin for every server
body:
![MegaBingo Title Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2fee5f863fd6a0e40089cb183487bf054bfa6059_0.webp)

# MegaBingo #
MegaBingo, a Minecraft plugin designed to bring Bingo to your server. Here, Bingo meets Minecraft, combining elements of exploration, mining, and crafting.

## Features: ##
#### Bingo Card Generation: #### 
MegaBingo generates unique and random Bingo cards for each player. The objectives in the bingo card can range from gathering materials to crafting specific items, offering different playstyles every time.

#### Balancing: #### 
MegaBingo offers five difficulty levels for the items, including Easy, Normal, Hard, Extreme, and Impossible, providing Each difficulty covers 20% of the bingo card giving everyone the same odds.

#### In-Game Item Settings: #### 
MegaBingo offers a setting GUI, where players can add or remove items from the Bingo list for each difficulty level, making it infinitely customizable to your preferences.


#### Persistent Storage:  ####
The plugin saves all the items you add and remove making sure they always stay. If you don't want to add anything there is plenty of items that are added by default. Want to go back to the defaults? Just delete the "bingoitems.yml" in the plugin folder and restart the server.

#### Permissions: ####
Every part of MegaBingo has a permission, there is permissions for the settings, participating in the event, starting or stopping the event.
If you have found any bugs or got any suggestions message me on discord: elmerlion

## Documentation ##
Commands: Permissions - Info

/bingo: megabingo.use - Opens your bingo card if the event has started.

/bingo start: megabingo.start - Starts the event and brings up everyones bingo cards.

/bingo stop: megabingo.stop - Stops the event if it has been started and removes all bingo cards etc.

/bingo settings: megabingo.settings - Opens the settings menu for all difficulties, here you can add or remove items from the clicked difficulty.
